In this context, a medical device includes a broad range of devices which act through a variety of physical, mechanical, thermal or similar means but specifically excludes devices which act through medicinal means such as pharmacological, metabolic or immunological methods. localizedDescriptions.en: An instrument, apparatus, implant, material or similar, used in the provision of healthcare.
